ai_summary: **Executive Summary:**  Prabha Energy Limited has set July 9, 2026, as the Record Date for the second and final call on its previously allotted partly paid-up rights equity shares. Eligible shareholders will be required to pay ₹47.52 per share (representing 33% of the total issue price) to convert these into fully paid shares, which will inject significant capital into the company. There are no immediate red flags; this is a standard procedure for completing a rights issue with an installment payment structure.
